news.title: SpaceX IPO raises total of $85.7 billion as underwriters exercise 'greenshoe' overallotment option
news.summary: Elon Musk's space and artificial intelligence company raised an initial $75 billion on Thursday. Musk's company is expected to raise an additional $50 billion in follow-up funding.

news.title: Trump is giving Warsh room to reshape the Fed
news.summary: The new Fed chair is on a political honeymoon with a U.S. president who has been the Fed's biggest opponent. The new chairman is expected to be in place by the end of the year.

news.title: Vance says 'a lot' of Iran deal details to figure out, but U.S. has 'all the cards'
news.summary: Vance: America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran. Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has all the cards.

news.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
news.summary: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

news.title: Anthropic to meet with Trump administration over Mythos dispute
news.summary: Anthropic received an export control directive that ordered the company to suspend access to its latest AI models by any foreign national. Anthropic received a directive from the U.S. State Department.

news.title: Social Security gave me conflicting answers about my cheating ex-husband’s record. What should I do?
news.summary: "I was married to my former husband for 23 years. After repeated instances of infidelity, we divorced," she said. "I am now single and I am very happy," she added.

news.title: My elderly mother and I own a home together. Will Medicaid force its sale?
news.summary: “My sister thinks Medicaid will take the house my mom and I own together,” she says. “I’m not worried about that. I just want my mom to be able to keep her house.”

news.title: Social Security’s woes are well known, but Medicare is also facing a fiscal crisis — in just 7 years
news.summary: Medicare Part A, which pays for inpatient hospital stays, would see an 11% payment cut. Part A pays for hospital stays in patients' homes.

news.title: The chip-stock rally is back in full force — thanks to two big geopolitical developments
news.summary: Anthropic's battle with the U.S. government could prompt a broadening of the AI buildout. Iran peace prospects are spurring gains for riskier stocks.

news.title: Fiserv CEO flees after presiding over 71% stock drop in his short tenure
news.summary: The financial-services company “continues to look strategically adrift,” an analyst says, as the stock falls further. The stock is down more than 10% this year, making it one of the worst performing S&P 500 stocks.
